summary: P5 Tasks Testing Complete - GroupFolioPage full implementation and deprecated code cleanup verified. Backend: All 7 Group Folio API tests PASSED. Frontend: GroupFolioPage fully functional with summary stats, group list, booking expansion, payment dialog, merge dialog, and merge history. Navigation verified after cleanup - no broken imports from deleted files.
critical_code_review_comments: GroupFolioPage.js uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
Dialog accessibility fix confirmed: auto-injected sr-only DialogDescription in dialog.jsx line 36
Backend Group Folio endpoints return proper response structure with all expected fields
Navigation works correctly after deletion of GMDashboardOptimized, MarketplaceInventory, PMSModuleOptimized, PerformanceMonitorDashboard, TestLogin
context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Folio feature fully tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/pms/group-folio-summary, /api/pms/group-folio/{id}/booking/{bid}, /api/pms/group-folio/payment, /api/pms/group-folio/merge all functional. Frontend GroupFolioPage at /group-folio with all features working.

GET /api/pms/group-folio-summary.details: Returns total_groups, active_groups, total_bookings, total_balance, merged_folios, merge_operations

GET /api/pms/group-folio/{group_id}.details: Returns group data with bookings list

GET /api/pms/group-folio/{group_id}/book.details: Returns booking folio detail with charges, folios, payments, extra_charges

POST /api/pms/group-folio/payment.details: Endpoint exists and validates input correctly

POST /api/pms/group-folio/merge.details: Endpoint exists and validates merge request

summary_stats.details: Shows 4 stat cards: Toplam Grup (8), Toplam Rez (8), Toplam Bakiye (-34,000 TL), Birlestirmeler (1)

group_list.details: Displays 8 groups with search/filter, status badges

group_selection.details: Clicking group shows booking details with accommodation, payment, balance

booking_expansion.details: Clicking booking row expands folio detail with line items

payment_dialog.details: Opens with amount input, booking select, method select, reference input

merge_dialog.details: Opens with master booking select, merge checkbox, warning message

dialog_accessibility.details: DialogDescription auto-injected (sr-only class) for all dialogs

group_total.details: Shows Grup Toplam Bakiye card with correct total

merge_history.details: Displays Birlestirme Gecmisi when merge logs exist
